arts.ttl: Aston Villa XI vs Crystal Palace – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa take on Crystal Palace at Wembley in the FA Cup semi-finals this evening. Unai Emery’s team are bidding to end a 29-year wait for a major trophy this season, while Villa have not won the FA Cup since 1957. arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs. Aston Villa: Both clubs looking to change course of history in FA Cup semi-final
arts.sum: Crystal Palace and Aston Villa square off in their FA Cup semi-final at Wembley Stadium on Saturday evening looking to end and extend respective streaks.
